title: Capstone: Build the Guardrail Middleware
concept: Assembling an action filter middleware that intercepts and validates agent tool calls against safety rules; 'Next up: Agents in Production.'.

exercises.prompt: What did we learn about testing agents' safety in the last lesson?

options.text: We learned to create tools for bypassing agent security.
We built a harness to verify agent guardrails against risks.
We developed safety rules for agent actions.

exercises.explain: In the last lesson, we focused on building a security regression harness that helps verify how well our guardrails keep agents safe from harmful actions.

cards.title: What is Middleware?
cards.body: Middleware is like a helpful gatekeeper that stands between two parts of a system. It ensures everything follows the rules before allowing access.

cards.title: Action Filter Middleware
cards.body: An action filter middleware checks agent actions by looking at their requests and deciding if they are safe or unsafe according to set rules.

cards.title: Like a Traffic Cop
cards.body: Imagine a traffic cop at an intersection. They decide who can go and who must stop. Action filter middleware works similarly by controlling what actions agents can take.

cards.title: Example of Action Validation
cards.body: If an agent tries to access sensitive data, the action filter will intercept the request, validate it, and either allow or deny access based on safety rules.

cards.title: Myth: Middleware Slows Down Agents
cards.body: Many think middleware slows down operations, but it actually strengthens safety without significantly slowing things down.

cards.title: How Middleware Works
cards.body: Middleware checks actions before they're executed to keep agents safe, just like a bouncer checks IDs before letting people in.

left.text: A request that can cause harm.

right.text: A request that follows safety rules.

exercises.prompt: What does action filter middleware do?

options.text: It boosts the speed of agent actions.
It checks agent requests against safety rules.
It monitors agents outside of their tasks.

exercises.explain: Action filter middleware's main purpose is to validate agent requests to ensure they comply with safety rules.

exercises.prompt: Action filter middleware helps agents perform any action without restrictions.
exercises.explain: This statement is false. Action filter middleware actually restricts actions that are considered unsafe.

exercises.prompt: Middleware acts like a __________ for agent actions to ensure safety.
exercises.sentence: Middleware acts like a gatekeeper for agent actions to ensure safety.
exercises.explain: The word 'gatekeeper' describes the role of middleware in monitoring and controlling actions.

exercises.prompt: Which statement about action filter middleware is AI-generated?

options.text: It is a weak link in agent systems.
It is essential for ensuring agent action safety.
It eliminates the need for safety rules.

exercises.explain: The AI-generated statement that is correct explains the essential role of action filter middleware in maintaining safety for agents.

exercises.prompt: What key function does action filter middleware serve in agent safety?

options.text: It verifies requests against safety rules before execution.
It makes agents self-sufficient without rules.
It monitors user feedback on agent performance.

exercises.explain: The correct answer highlights that action filter middleware's main job is to check requests against defined safety rules, ensuring agents do not perform harmful actions. Next up: Agents in Production.
